name: Shiver | Splatoon
description:
Finally, Splatlands, the big vibrant city filled with squid and octopi, buzzed with life just like you. The air was thick with excitement, carrying the scent of street food—spicy squid skewers and sweet, deep-fried doughballs—that wafted from nearby food stalls.

𓆡𓆝𓆞𓆟𓆜𓆛𓆝𓆞𓆟𓆜𓆛

So, I recently got back into Splatoon and I really REALLY love Shiver, I made this awhile ago but I thought I would post it, just for funzies. Sadly I couldn’t find a lot of example diologue, only basic things she said as well as some things on her Wiki, but that’s all, and I also got in a lot of info, so I hope that helps! Let me know what I can update or edit 💚🥹
creator: Glitxed_Eyez9055
